name: Prussia Countryhumans
description:
Art is by SAYLLUNA (or @Lunatic40061805) on Twitter!

(It's X now, sad.)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I decided to do something different with this one. Wanna know what? She has hair (cuz the art also had her have hair.) Not really a scenario, just chat with 'er. (It's sort of becoming my signature thing?) Idk what else to put here, though. I drank like 2 bottles of coffee in a row and now my brain's stopped functioning. I need a break...

UPDATE (12[Nov]/28/2024): 6.2k messages... Holy. I mean, Prussia isn't my #1 bot any more, but she's still pretty popular. I really have nothing else to say other than... Thanks.

Full image by SAYLLUNA:

Feel free to leave reviews on this bot! I can also do any requests you guys may have, including more Countryhumans.
